response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience, deep systems thinking, and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, but lacks clear evidence of staff-level technical strategy in AI-native environments, has a recent career gap, and minimal Python or operational ownership documentation — critical for this role.
strengths: Experienced with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq
Proven track record in distributed, high-throughput systems (e.g., millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby)
Strong open-source contributions and tooling expertise (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts, Trial)
concerns: No explicit Python expertise listed despite being a must-have
Career gap since Oct 2025 raises questions about current engagement and readiness
Lacks documented experience with on-call ownership or agile scrum champion roles
